name: Shanghai Hanbell Precise Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Hanbell Precise Machinery Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and after-sales service of screw compressors in China. Its products include screw refrigerating, refrigerant, and air compressors, as well as vacuum pumps. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Hanbell Machinery Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanghai Hanbell Precise Machinery Co., Ltd. in December 2005. Shanghai Hanbell Precise Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Shanghai, China.
